node.statement: Step C (Stage 2 divide-and-conquer, Proposition P_2). The remaining inner products <s, P^l_{nm}> over all (l,m,n) with -l <= m,n <= l, 0 <= l < N are evaluated by the Beta-FFT-procedure, which expands P_{L+r} via the Shifted-coeffs (A,B) and applies the Composition-rule recursively. With splitting parameter k=1 (halving once), the total cost across all O(N^3) coefficients is O(N^4) (paper line 1369).
